Off Calendar Mar-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT NINA GURALNIK's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Cross-Complaint is GRANTED. No opposition filed Cross-Complaint shall be filed and served forthwith. Cross-Complainant is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B in future. Prevailing party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Rebecca A. Wiseman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
